documentation.description: Control on-board Camera Control System to take shots.

record_types.name: Digicam_Control

fields.name: Session
fields.description:
0: stop, 1: start or keep it up //Session control e.g. show/hide
lens.

fields.name: Zoom_Pos
fields.description: 1 to N //Zoom's absolute position (0 means ignore).

fields.name: Zoom_Step
fields.description:
-100 to 100 //Zooming step value to offset zoom from the current
position.

fields.name: Focus_Lock
fields.description:
0: unlock focus or keep unlocked, 1: lock focus or keep locked, 3:
re-lock focus.

fields.name: Command_Id
fields.description:
Command Identity (incremental loop: 0 to 255)//A command sent
multiple times will be executed or pooled just once.

subprograms.name: Check_CRC

  (Connect : in out MAVLink.V1.Connection)
   return Boolean

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description:
Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.
